name: Polish Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind pork and beef very coarsely.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Stuff the mixture into hog casings or form into patties.
Note: The original recipe text included extraneous information such as attribution lines, references to other books, and newsgroup posts that are not part of the actual recipe instructions. This version focuses solely on the ingredients and clear steps for preparing Polish sausage.
